data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a public review request after a positive survey. While the linked use case mentions that positive responses trigger a request for a Google review, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this behavior is implemented as required. The lack of specific API reads or persisted state checks to validate this functionality indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No concrete evidence of API behavior confirming the public review request after a positive survey.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
